data.name: Chains of Bondage
data.detailed_description:
Chains of Bondage is an adult BDSM survival simulator set in a harsh, post-apocalyptic world where domination is power—and submission is purpose.

Civilization is gone. What remains is a brutal, lawless wasteland full of danger, decay, and desire. In this world, the strong carve out their own empires—and you’re building yours one submissive at a time. Rule from the safety of your dungeon stronghold, train your devoted followers, explore the ruins of a broken world, and indulge in dark erotic fantasies built around control, structure, and sensual discipline.

This is not a story of cruelty. It’s a world where submission is freely given, and your subjects live to serve—eager to obey, eager to please, and eager to be claimed.

🖤 Submissives Who Live to Serve

The submissives you bring into your world aren’t just NPCs—they’re central to your empire. Each one is unique, with their own limits, personality, and preferences. Some arrive eager to serve. Others need structure, guidance, and a firm hand to truly embrace their role.

Through careful training—or merciless efficiency—you’ll shape them into obedient assets ready to fulfill your needs, whether that’s service, display, or simple devotion.

  • Obedience and discipline systems that track behavior, loyalty, and routine

  • Assign roles: from obedient housemaids to field workers

  • Dynamic emotional and physical states affected by your choices and training style

  • Bond with your submissives—or keep them at arm’s length as tools of your power

🏚️ Build the Dungeon of Your Desires

Start with a crumbling shelter and turn it into a thriving base of operations—equal parts survival compound and personal pleasure palace. Every machine you place, every room you build, serves a function: obedience, comfort, punishment, or pleasure.

Whether you’re designing a strict, clinical training facility or a lavish playground of perversion, your base reflects your style of control.

  • Modular base-building with full room and layout customization

  • Place training machines, restraint stations, comfort zones, and more

  • Design distinct spaces for discipline, worship, work, or display

  • Upgrade your dungeon over time with new technology and utilities

  • Manage power, maintenance, and resource flow as your operation grows

🧭 Explore a Dangerous, Decadent Wasteland

Your dungeon is safe—for now. But out in the ruined world, supplies are scarce, threats are everywhere, and hidden opportunities are waiting to be claimed. Send yourself or your submissives out into the wild to explore abandoned buildings, fight off threats, and uncover resources.

Not everyone you meet will submit easily. But those who do may prove very… useful.

  • Scavenge materials from decayed structures and dangerous ruins

  • Encounter threats like zombies, raiders, and other survivors

  • Engage in light combat and manage risk/reward while exploring

  • Discover submissive survivors with potential for training and obedience

  • Expand your territory and uncover more about the world before the fall

🎭 Erotic Roleplay, Fantasy, and Fetish Immersion

Chains of Bondage isn’t just about systems and structure—it’s also a deeply erotic sandbox filled with fantasy, mood, and intimate control. Take your seat on the throne and trigger kink-specific scenes narrated by a voice-acted dominatrix. Unlock new fantasies, explore new fetishes, and build your own erotic story as your dungeon evolves.

  • Choose which kinks, scenes, and tones you want to experience

  • Voice-acted text scenes unlocked through gameplay and mood

  • New fantasies and fetishes added regularly with updates

  • Dynamic events based on slave behavior and dungeon activity

  • Immersive sound design and atmosphere built for dark roleplay

🔞 Mature Content Advisory

Chains of Bondage contains explicit sexual content and is intended for adults 18+ only. This includes:

  • BDSM themes such as bondage, dominance/submission, humiliation, and service

  • Nudity, sexual content, fetish gear (latex, collars, restraints, etc.)

  • Consensual roleplay scenes with a focus on power exchange

  • Post-apocalyptic combat with mild-to-moderate violence

  • All characters are adults (18+) and all scenes are rooted in safe, sane, and consensual kink dynamics

This is a fantasy space for players who enjoy the aesthetics and power of BDSM—presented with care, depth, and respect for the genre and its audience.

data.short_description: Chains of Bondage is a BDSM-themed post-apocalyptic survival sim where you build a dungeon, train submissive followers, and explore a dangerous world. Manage resources, slaves and survive the day after tomorrow!
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 10
  • 處理器: Ryzen 3 1300X / Intel Core i5 7500
  • 記憶體: 16 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: AMD Radeon 780M (6GB VRAM Minimum) / Nvidia GeForce GTX 1060 6GB
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統: Windows 11
  • 處理器: Ryzen 5 3600 / Intel Core i5 10400F
  • 記憶體: 32 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: AMD Radeon RX 6600 XT / Nvidia GeForce RTX 3060
  • 儲存空間: 5 GB 可用空間

© 2025 Dark Tether Games. All rights reserved.
